creator: michal@maximale.sk
text:
(In reply to Timur I. Bakeyev from comment #6)

Thanks for the patch. I'll test it later.

I don't understand your question. I disabled them because I don't want them to be compiled at all. I don't need LDAP, AD. I even don't need printing. Afterall, they are all optional (in the sense that they can be turned off by the user). Are some of those "options" required to even link the binary correctly (like python bindings)? Then those shouldn't be optional.
